initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> The trade proposed by Player RED is to give 5 X in exchange for 10 Y. I currently have 5 X and 25 Y. If I accept this trade, I would give up 10 Y and gain 5 X, which would result in me having 10 X and 15 Y. This would increase my total resources. I should accept this trade. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

</critique>
